scoringPlays.text: Mark Gronowski 2 Yd Run (Drew Stevens Kick)
Zach Lutmer 34 Yd Interception Return (Drew Stevens Kick)
Reece Vander Zee 29 Yd pass from Mark Gronowski (Drew Stevens Kick)
Kaden Wetjen 50 Yd Punt Return (Drew Stevens Kick)
Jeremy Hecklinski 6 Yd Run (Drew Stevens Kick)

videos.headline: Zach Lutmer runs INT back for an Iowa pick-six
videos.description: Zach Lutmer comes up with an electric pick-six for the Hawkeyes vs. the Golden Gophers.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Zach Lutmer runs INT back for an Iowa pick-six) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: Iowa goes up 24-0 on Mark Gronowski's TD pass to Reece Vander Zee
videos.description: Mark Gronowski lets it fly 29-yards to Reece Vander Zee for an Iowa touchdown vs. Minnesota.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Iowa goes up 24-0 on Mark Gronowski's TD pass to Reece Vander Zee) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kaden Wetjen returns the punt for a Hawkeyes TD
videos.description: Kaden Wetjen returns the punt for an Iowa touchdown to give the Hawkeyes a 31-0 lead over the Golden Gophers.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kaden Wetjen returns the punt for a Hawkeyes TD) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jeremy Hecklinski scores to tack on to Iowa's lead
videos.description: Jeremy Hecklinski solidifies Iowa's win over Minnesota with a 6-yard rushing touchdown in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jeremy Hecklinski scores to tack on to Iowa's lead) 2025/10/25 ESHEET
